query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workspace_timeline WHERE workspace_id = 1) AS timeline_events,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workspace_tasks WHERE workspace_id = 1) AS tasks,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workspace_notes WHERE workspace_id = 1) AS notes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workspace_documents WHERE workspace_id = 1) AS documents,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workspace_next_actions WHERE workspace_id = 1) AS next_actions,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workspace_ai_analyses WHERE workspaceId = 1) AS ai_analyses,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_briefs WHERE sourceId = 1 AND sourceType = 'workspace') AS ai_briefs;
